tasks.prompt:
Check if the depth-dom pipeline on VPS (185.185.82.205) has finished processing all 5 days. Run this expect command:

```
cd "/Users/paolo/Desktop/DEPTH DOM VPS" && expect << 'EOF'
set timeout 30
spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@185.185.82.205 "tail -3 /opt/depth-dom/pipeline_full3.log 2>&1; echo '---'; wc -l /opt/depth-dom/output/2025-12-18/sampled_events.csv 2>&1"
expect {
    "password:" {
        send "782789Pao!\r"
        expect eof
    }
}
EOF
```

If you see "Phase 6" or "Phase 6 completed" in the output, or if all 5 days show sampled_events.csv files, the pipeline is DONE. Reply with "Pipeline completato!" and the final statistics.

If still running (showing Pass 2 or Phase numbers), do NOT reply — just let the cron job fire again in 2 minutes.
